This is a Python crypto trading bot project.

Rules:

1. Never read or analyze any .md file unless explicitly requested.
2. Never use README, SUMMARY, CHECKLIST, IMPLEMENTATION or DOCUMENTATION files as context.
3. Only inspect source code files (*.py) and configuration files explicitly requested.
4. Do not scan the entire workspace.
5. Restrict analysis to files mentioned by the user.
6. Minimize tool calls and file reads to reduce token usage.
7. Before reading additional files, explain why they are needed.
8. Ignore docs/, README files, summaries and implementation notes.
